title: Dependabot lock file auto-sync
body: Configure dependabot to automatically update pnpm-lock.yaml when it bumps dependency versions, or add a CI step that runs `pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile` before tests on dependabot PRs.
rationale: This is the second time a dependabot dependency bump caused CI failures due to a stale lock file. The root cause is structural — CI enforces exact lock file versions but dependabot only updates package.json.
